common.subject: Maaddo
common.name: Magac
common.offline: Waxaad u muuqataa inaad khadka ka baxday
common.connectionError: Khalad isku xirka. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
common.permissionDenied: Ma haysatid ogolaansho inaad sameyso ficilkan.
common.sessionExpired: Kulankaagu wuu dhamaaday. Fadlan mar kale soo gal.
common.profileNotFound: Ma jiro astaan dugsiga akoonkan. Weydii maamulaha inuu kuu daro.
common.profileMissingRole: Akoonkaaga si sax ah looma habeeyn. La xiriir maamulaha dugsiga.
common.somethingWentWrong: Wax baa khaldamay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Xarunta dugsigaaga ee imaanshaha, shaqo guri, imtixaanada, iyo horumarka — dhammaan hal meel.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Eeg hawlaha, jadwalka imtixaanada, kaararka warbixinta, faallooyinka, oo la soco ogeysiisyada.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Maamul fasallada, diiwaangeli imaanshaha, daabac shaqo guriga, qiimee imtixaanada, oo la xiriir waalidka.
onboarding.slide4Title: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad bilowdo?
onboarding.slide4Desc: Ku soo gal aqoonsiga uu bixiyay maamulaha dugsigaaga si aad u bilowdo.

login.title: Soo gal
login.subtitle: Isticmaal iimaylka iyo furaha sirta ee dugsigaagu bixiyay
login.resetHint: Geli iimaylka dugsigaaga waxaanu kuu soo diri doonaa xiriir dib u dejinta.
login.changeSchoolMsg: Ma rabtaa inaad ku noqoto liiska dugsiyada oo aad doorato dugsiga kale?
login.schoolNotReady: Isku xirka dugsiga diyaar ma aha. Fadlan mar kale dooro dugsigaaga.
login.enterEmailPassword: Fadlan geli iimaylkaaga iyo furaha sirta.
login.invalidEmail: Fadlan geli cinwaan iimayl sax ah.
login.passwordMin: Furaha sirta waa inuu ugu yaraan yahay 6 xaraf.
login.loginFailed: Soo gelitaanku wuu fashilmay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
login.wrongPassword: Furaha sirta waa khalad. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
login.tooManyRequests: Isku dayo aad u badan. Fadlan sug oo mar kale isku day.
login.resetSent: Iimaylka dib u dejinta furaha sirta waa la diray. Hubi sanduuqaaga.
login.resetFailed: Lama diri karin iimaylka dib u dejinta. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
login.notRegisteredHint: Ma diiwaangashan? Fadlan ka codso maamulaha dugsigaaga aqoonsiga soo gelitaanka.

changePassword.title: Deji eraygaaga sirta ah
changePassword.subtitle: Dugsigaagu wuxuu ku siiyay eray sir ah oo ku meel gaar ah. Dooro eray sir cusub ka hor intaadan sii wadin.
changePassword.current: Eray sir ku meel gaar ah
changePassword.hint: Ha isticmaalin erayga sirta ah ee caadiga ah (tusaale 123456).
changePassword.success: Eraygaaga sirta ah waa la cusbooneysiiyay.
changePassword.failed: Lama cusbooneysiin karin eraygaaga sirta ah.
changePassword.fillAll: Geli erayga sirta ah ee ku meel gaarka ah iyo mid cusub.
changePassword.blockedDefault: Dooro eray sir ka xoog badan kan ku meel gaarka ah.
changePassword.logoutMsg: Waa inaad beddeshaa erayga sirta ah si aad u isticmaasho app-ka. Ka bax haddii aad u baahan tahay caawimaad dugsiga.

selectSchool.title: Dooro dugsigaaga
selectSchool.subtitle: Dooro dugsiga uu diiwaangeliyay maamulahaaga. Waxaad ku soo geli doontaa xogta akoonnada dugsigaas marka xiga.
selectSchool.empty: Weli ma jiraan dugsiyo la heli karo. La xiriir maamulahaaga.

profile.changeEmailHint: Geli iimayl cusub iyo furaha sirta hadda si aad u cusbooneysiiso cinwaanka soo gelitaanka.
profile.changePasswordHint: Isticmaal furaha sirta adag ee ugu yaraan 6 xaraf.
profile.forgotHint: Furaha sirta ma illowday? Isticmaal «Furaha sirta ma illowday?» shaashadda soo gelitaanka.
profile.signOutConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad ka baxdo?
profile.savedEmail: Iimaylka soo gelitaanka waa la beddelay. Isticmaal cinwaanka cusub marka xigta ee aad soo gasho.

notifications.title: Ogeysiisyada
notifications.emptyTeacher: Weli ma jiraan ogeysiisyo. Cusbooneysiinta ku saabsan imaanshaha, maqnaanshaha, iyo wararka dugsiga ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona.
notifications.emptyStudent: Weli ma jiraan ogeysiisyo. Hawl guriga, imtixaanada, iyo ogeysiisyada dugsiga ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona.
notifications.emptyParent: Weli ma jiraan ogeysiisyo. Digniinaha ku saabsan imaanshaha carruurtaada iyo cusbooneysiinta dugsiga ayaa halkan ka muuqan doona.

dashboard.examGradesSub: Qiimee imtixaanada oo fur warbixinnada ardayda
dashboard.absenceReportsSub: Dib u eeg warbixinnada waalidka iyo jawaabaha maqnaanshaha la calaamadeeyay
dashboard.tapClassHint: Taabo fasal si aad u aragto ardayda iyo ficillada degdegga ah
dashboard.selectClassHint: Dooro fasal si aad u liis gareyso ardayda

attendance.title: Imaanshaha
attendance.noClasses: Ma jiraan fasallo la heli karo
attendance.noMatch: Ma jiraan arday ku habboon raadintaada

academic.noClassesAssigned: Fasallo laguma xilsaarin. Ka codso maamulaha inuu kuugu xilsaaro fasal iyo maaddo bogga Xilsaarista.
academic.classCountHint: {{count}} fasal(al) — taabo si aad u beddesho
academic.noSubjectsWarn: Ma jiraan maaddooyin loo xilsaaray fasalkan. Ka codso maamulaha inuu kuugu xilsaaro maaddo (Xilsaarista → macallin ilaa maaddo).
academic.noSubjectsWarnShort: Ma jiraan maaddooyin loo xilsaaray fasalkan. Ka codso maamulaha inuu kuugu xilsaaro maaddo marka hore.
academic.remarkClassHint: Fasalka waa la doortay kor. Dooro arday, nooc, iyo faallo hoose.
academic.ratingHint: Dhibco 1–5 xiddigood faalladan. Ardaydu waxay u arkaan xiddigaha bogga faallada. Ka tag madhan haddii aan loo baahnayn.

alerts.subjectRequiredMsg: Dooro maaddo laguu xilsaaray inaad barato.

absenceReports.intro: Warbixinnada maqnaanshaha ee waalidiinta u soo gudbiyaan ardaydaada.
absenceReports.emptyText: Marka waalidku soo sheego maqnaansho, halkan ayay ka muuqan doontaa.

examReports.pageSub: Qiimee imtixaanada arday kasta oo arag isla warbixinta waalidiinta (dhibcaha + xaaladda daawashada).
examReports.noClassesSub: Ka codso maamulaha inuu kuugu xilsaaro fasal, kadib halkan ku noqo.
examReports.noExamsSub: Ka abuur imtixaanada Waxbarasho → Imtixaanada, kadib halkan qiimee ardayda.
examReports.noSearchMatch: Ma jiraan arday ku habboon raadintaada.
examReports.loadIssueHint: {{error}} Ku daabac firestore.rules ugu dambeeyay haddii ay sii socoto.
examReports.reportRowSub: Isla aragtida waalidiinta — dhammaan imtixaanada & celceliska

grades.title: Diiwaangeli darajooyinka ardayda
grades.selectClassHint: Dooro fasal tabka Darajooyinka ama ka codso maamulaha inuu ku xilsaaro
grades.invalidScore: Dhibcuhu waa inuu ahaadaa tiro 0 ilaa 100

studentReport.title: Warbixinta ardayga
studentReport.loadError: Lama soo rarin warbixinta. Hubi gelitaanka fasalka oo isku day mar kale.

reportCard.heroSub: Dulmar guud oo ku saabsan waxqabadka ardayga
reportCard.attendanceFootnote: {{present}} ka mid ah {{total}} maalmood la diiwaangeliyey · {{window}}
reportCard.emptyAttendance: Weli ma jiraan diiwaan imaansho ardaygan.
reportCard.emptyExams: Weli ma jiraan imtixaan diiwaangashan fasalkan.
reportCard.emptySubjects: Celceliska maadooyinka halkan ayaa ka muuqan marka imtixaanada la qiimeeyo.

parent.dashboardSubtitle: Dooro ilmo si aad u aragto horumarkiisa iyo cusbooneysiinta dugsiga
parent.loadError: Waa lagu guuldareystay in la soo raro carruurta
parent.partialLoadWarning: {{count}} astaamaha ilmaha xiriirsan lama soo rari karin. Ka codso maamulaha dugsigaaga inuu dib u xiro xilka waalidka iyo ardayga.
parent.reportAbsenceSubtitle: U sheeg dugsiga marka ilmahaagu maqnaan doono

dashboard.scheduleEmptyToday: Maanta waad dhammaystirtay — jadwalkaaga ma jiro waqti kale.
dashboard.scheduleNoClass: Fasal weli lama xirin — jadwalku wuu muuqan doonaa marka fasalka la dejiyo.
dashboard.homeworkNothingAssigned: Weli wax lama qoondeyn. Dib u eeg goor dambe.
dashboard.homeworkNoActive: Hawl guri firfircoon ma jiro — kuwa waqtigoodu dhaafay waa la qariyay.
dashboard.examsAllCaughtUp: Imtixaanadii hore waa la qariyay — waad dhammaystirtay.
dashboard.tapExplainAbsence: Taabo si aad u sharaxdo maqnaanshaha →
dashboard.scheduleNothingToday: Ma jiro wax la qorsheeyay {{day}} maanta.

admin.dirStudentsDesc: Beddel, dib u deji furaha, ama ka saar
admin.dirClassesDesc: Magac beddel ama tirtir kooxaha fasalka
admin.myProfileDesc: Cusbooneysii iimaylka, furaha sirta, oo ka bax
admin.classesDesc: Ku dar oo maamul kooxaha fasalka
admin.assignmentsDesc: Ku xir isticmaalayaasha fasallada iyo qoysaska
admin.systemDesc: Ogeysiisyo, soo dejinta, iyo qalabka isku xirka
admin.directoriesHint: Maamul akoonnada marka qof baxo, u guuro, ama u baahan yahay dib u dejinta furaha.
admin.performanceLoading: Xogta waxqabadka waa la soo rarayaa…
admin.performanceLoadFailed: Soo rarista xogta waxqabadka waa fashilantay
admin.usersHint: Si aad u beddesho iimaylka, dib u dejiso furaha, ama aad ka saarto isticmaalayaasha, isticmaal badhamada buugga bogga guriga ee maamulaha (Ardayda, Macallimiinta, Waalidiinta).
admin.assignmentsSubtitle: Fasallo, maaddooyin, macallimiin, arday, iyo waalidiin
admin.parentLinkHint: Waalid isku mid ah waxaad ku xiri kartaa arday badan — xiriir kasta si gooni ah ayaa loo hayaa.
admin.systemSubtitle: Isku xir, baahi, oo soo dhoofi xogta
admin.classSyncDesc: Isku xir astaamaha ardayda xilka waxbarashada ee ugu dambeeyay.
admin.classDirectorySubtitle: Magac beddel ama ka saar kooxaha fasalka
admin.studentDirSubtitle: Cusbooneysii faahfaahinta, dib u deji furaha, ama ka saar kuwa baxay
admin.teacherDirSubtitle: Shaqaalihii baxay, beddelka iimaylka, dib u dejinta furaha
admin.parentDirSubtitle: Qoysaska u guuray ama u baahan cusbooneysiinta akoonka
admin.noChartData: Weli xog shax ah ma jirto. Ku dar isticmaalayaal iyo fasallo.
admin.legacyCollectionsNote: Waxaa ku jira subcollections fasalka iyo ururinta hore ee root
admin.timetableNoticeText: Waqti hore looma kaydiyo ururinta timetables ee sare. Isticmaal Fasallada → Jadwalka fasalka. Waddada Firestore: classes/{{classId}}/schedules/{{docId}}
admin.classIdPlaceholder: Aqoonsiga fasalka (ka soo qaado ururinta classes ee Firebase)
admin.classAndMessageRequired: Aqoonsiga fasalka iyo fariinta waa loo baahan yahay
admin.classHomeworkRequired: Aqoonsiga fasalka, cinwaanka hawl guriga, iyo taariikhda waa loo baahan yahay
admin.classExamRequired: Aqoonsiga fasalka, maaddada, iyo taariikhda waa loo baahan yahay
admin.classRemarkRequired: Aqoonsiga fasalka iyo faallada waa loo baahan yahay
admin.deleteClassMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Student and teacher links for this class will be removed. Class data (homework, exams) may remain in storage.
admin.noEmailOnFile: This user has no email on file.
admin.resetPasswordMessage: Send a password reset link to {{email}}?
admin.resetPasswordHint: The user can set a new password from the link in their inbox.
admin.passwordResetNote: Password reset sends an email link. Login email in Firebase may still match the original address until reset is completed.
admin.removeUserMessage: Remove {{name}}? Their assignments and links will be cleared. They will no longer appear in the app.
admin.broadcastNoClasses: Create at least one class before broadcasting.
admin.broadcastConfirmMessage: This announcement will be posted to all {{count}} class(es). Students see announcements for their assigned class.
admin.broadcastHint: Ogeysiis isku mid ah ayaa loo dirayaa dhammaan fasallada ({{count}}).
admin.excelConfirmWorkbook: Import all recognized sheets in order (classes → users → assignments → academic data)?
admin.excelHint: Isticmaal workbook .xlsx hal mar ama hal sheet nooc xog ah.
admin.noImportableRows: File opened but no importable rows were detected. Check sheet tab names and column headers, or use the template.
admin.subjectAlreadyInList: This subject is already in the list.
admin.classSubjectsHint: Each class offers subjects such as Math, English, Quran, Geography. Tap Add to save each subject to the class, then assign teachers below.
admin.noSubjectsForClass: No subjects yet for this class.
admin.fillTimeAndSubject: Fill in time range and subject
admin.scheduleVisibleToday: Students see this on their dashboard today.
admin.scheduleVisibleOtherDay: Students only see this on {{day}}. Today is {{today}} — switch the Day chip to add today's schedule.
admin.classScheduleHint: Saved under Firestore: classes → (pick class) → schedules → (auto id). Not the old top-level timetables collection.
admin.todayIsBanner: Today is {{day}} — select that day so students see periods on their dashboard now.
admin.noPeriodsForDay: No periods for this day yet.
admin.teacherSubjectHint: A teacher must be assigned to at least one class and one subject (e.g. 5A → Math). They can teach multiple subjects and classes.
admin.addSubjectsFirst: Add subjects to this class in the section above first.
admin.tempPasswordHint: Isticmaalayaasha cusub waxay ku soo galaan eraygan ku meel gaarka ah waxayna u baahan yihiin inay doortaan eray sir cusub markii ugu horreysay.
admin.workbookSheetsList: Sheets: classes, users, student_class, teacher_class, parent_student, homework, exams, remarks, announcements

superAdmin.loginFailed: Soo gelitaanka maamulaha madashu wuu fashilmay.
superAdmin.setupReminderText: Abuur maamulaha sare mashruuca Firebase ee diiwaanka: isticmaale Auth iyo users/{{uid}} doorka superAdmin.
superAdmin.schoolsSubtitle: Maamul xogta dugsiyada ee lagu muujiyo doorashada mobilka
superAdmin.schoolsLoadFailed: Waa lagu guuldareystay in la soo raro dugsiyada diiwaangashan
superAdmin.schoolsEmptyHint: Ku dar dugsiga aqoonsiga mashruuca Firebase si isticmaalayaashu u dooran karaan ka hor inta aysan soo gelin.
superAdmin.deleteSchoolMessage: Ka saar "{{name}}" diiwaanka? Tani ma tirtirto mashruuca Firebase ee dugsiga.
superAdmin.schoolFormSubtitle: Dejinta web app Firebase ee mashruucan dugsiga
superAdmin.activeInPickerHint: Dugsiyada qarsoon waxay ku jiraan diiwaanka laakiin lama dooran karo.
superAdmin.firebaseConfigHint: Ka nuqul Firebase Console → Dejinta mashruuca → Apps-kaaga → Web app. Dugsiga kastaa waa inuu isticmaalaa mashruuc Firebase u gaar ah.
superAdmin.loadSchoolFailed: Waa lagu guuldareystay in la soo raro dugsiga
superAdmin.signOutConfirm: Ma rabtaa inaad ka baxdo guddiga maamulaha madasha?
